name: ADX + FastD
description: ADX + FastD + Fisher RSI combo for trend entry
summary: Catches trending moves by combining 3 indicators. Buys when a strong trend starts and sells when momentum fades.

name: RSI + BB + MACD
description: RSI + Bollinger Band + MACD combo for mean reversion entry
summary: Buys when price drops too far below its average and sells when it bounces back. Works best in ranging markets.

name: BB + EMA + MFI
description: Bollinger Band + EMA100 + MFI combo
summary: Buys oversold dips when price and money flow are both low, then sells on recovery. Best in sideways markets.

name: MACD + MFI + SAR
description: MACD + MFI + Parabolic SAR trend following
summary: Rides strong trends by confirming direction with multiple signals. Exits automatically when the trend reverses.

name: SMA + EMA + Momentum
description: SMA/EMA crossover with momentum and CCI filter
summary: Buys when short-term and long-term averages cross upward with strong momentum. Sells when momentum weakens.

name: FreqAI Reinforcement Learning
description: FreqAI reinforcement learning adaptive strategy with self-training models
summary: Uses AI that learns and adapts its own trading rules from market data. Continuously improves over time.

name: Bandtastic
description: RSI + MFI + multi-level Bollinger Bands (4 std levels) with EMA filter
summary: Buys at multiple price drop levels for better average entry. Sells on recovery, filtered by the overall trend.

name: Supertrend
description: ATR-based Supertrend with hyperoptable multiplier/period (3 buy + 3 sell)
summary: Follows the trend using volatility-based channels. Buys on breakouts and sells when the trend flips.

name: Pattern Recognition
description: All ta-lib candlestick patterns for buy/sell signals
summary: Reads candlestick chart shapes to predict price moves. Trades based on dozens of classic chart patterns.

name: GodStra
description: Uses all ta-lib indicators via add_all_ta_features. Ichimoku, Keltner, MFI, KST
summary: Combines every available technical signal into one strategy. Highly complex, best for optimization experiments.

name: HLHB
description: Classic HLHB system — EMA5/EMA10 cross with RSI and ADX filter
summary: Classic trend system that buys when fast and slow averages cross, filtered by trend strength. Simple and reliable.

name: ADX Momentum
description: ADX + directional indicators (+DI/-DI) with SAR and momentum
summary: Enters trades when price builds strong directional momentum. Exits when the move loses steam.

name: BBand RSI
description: RSI + Bollinger Bands mean reversion
summary: Buys when price drops below its normal range and sells when it snaps back. Simple two-signal approach.

name: CombinedBinHAndCluc
description: Combined BinH + Cluc strategy with custom BB, EMA50, and volume filter
summary: Merges two proven dip-buying strategies with volume confirmation. Catches price rebounds with extra safety checks.

name: Scalp
description: Quick scalping with BB, EMA, StochFast, ADX
summary: Catches small, fast price moves by combining 4 indicators. Trades frequently on short timeframes.

name: TD Sequential
description: Tom DeMark TD Sequential pattern-based strategy
summary: Counts consecutive price bars to predict when a trend is exhausted and about to reverse.

name: FreqAI Example
description: ML feature engineering with RSI, MFI, ADX, SMA, EMA, BB, ROC, relative volume
summary: Trains a machine learning model on many market features to predict price direction. Good starting point for AI trading.

name: FreqAI Hybrid
description: TEMA + MACD + RSI combined with FreqAI ML classifier
summary: Blends traditional trading signals with AI predictions for higher-confidence entries. Best of both worlds.

name: Futures Supertrend
description: Supertrend for futures with shorting support (can_short=True)
summary: Follows trends in futures markets, profiting from both up and down moves. Shorts when the trend turns bearish.

name: Volatility System
description: ATR resampled 3h with absolute close change for volatility breakout
summary: Waits for quiet periods then trades the breakout when volatility spikes. Profits from sudden price explosions.

name: OTT Futures
description: Optimized Trend Tracker with VAR and ADX for futures
summary: Tracks the optimal trend line in futures markets, entering when price breaks above and exiting on pullbacks.
